titleStmt.title: SII 4.1186: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1186. (A.R. No. 309-B of 1893). RIGHT OF No. 1185.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīśakavarṣaṁbulu 1075 gu nēṁṭi śrīkulōttuṁggacōḍadēvara vijayarājya saṁvatsaramu
la koḍku nīlagrīvabhaṭṭōpādhyāyala mudrācāryyānantabhaṭṭōpādhyāyasōmayājulunuṁ kumārasvāmibhaṭṭōpādhyāya ddhanabhaṭōpādhyāyaluṁ daruṇēṁdu śēkharabhaṭṭōpādhyāyavāja
pēyayājula koḍku yajñamūrttibhaṭlunu nūṁkkanabhaṭōpādhyāyalanu nāgadēvabhaṭṭōpādhyāyalanu ccina śrāvaṇapatrameṭlanna nēmu śrīparāṁtakadēvara ṇḍamuna
raṭṭaḍikāmu vratigrahiṁcci Aṣṭabhōgasalvisaṁpadalatō nanubhaviṁcci vaccucunnadāni nammucuṇḍa svasti . śrīmadanantavarmmamahārājulaina cōḍagaṁggadēvara tammuṇḍu
Ulaguyyavaṁddapermmāḍiyu vīri dēvulu vallavamahādēviyunu śrīmaddākṣārāmabhīmēśvaramahādē varddhayāmapūjayaṁdula caṁdanakarpūramulaku nivēdyamu
naku nācaṁdrārkkamu naḍacunaṭṭugā gaṁgagoṇḍacōḍavairāgiyāṇḍāricētaṁ butteṁccina nūṭaIru ṇḍu māḍalakuṁ dagu velagāṁ jēkoni Aṇḍamūri raṭṭaḍikamula
tōṁ Aṣṭabōgasatvisaṁpadalatō śrībhīmēśvaramahādēvaraku sarvvasammatiṁ Uri niccitimi .Itthaṁ vikra ṇapermmāḍirāju koḍku peddajiyyanāyani cōḍagaṁggu peṭṭina [A]
khaṇḍavartti lōhadaṇḍu di 1 ṇḍiki muṇḍavunaḍavuna muduvananāvani vasamunaṁ beṭṭina InpaEḍlu 25 paḍi 2 nalavunaḍapuna kamanasūrani pasamuna beṭṭina InupaEḍlu
25 ṇḍiki nēti paḍi 2 toṁḍakalinamēḍapōta peṭṭina Akhaṇḍavartti lōhadaṇḍu di 1 ṇḍiki modali Aḍavuna Āyitibōla Eṟiyani vasamuna beṭṭina
Eḍlu 25 ṇḍiki nityapaḍi nē paḍi 2 tellanadēmana vasamunaṁ beṭṭina paḍi paḍi 2 .
Digital edition of SII 4.1186 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
